name: codex-danger-gate
description: Layer human confirmation across supported high-risk tool calls, sandbox permission requests, and Agent startup context.

interface.shortDescription: Layered confirmation for high-risk Agent actions.
interface.longDescription: Adds independent Windows confirmation dialogs for supported PreToolUse and PermissionRequest events, plus concise destructive-action confirmation context at session and subagent start. Unexposed tool routes inside writable areas remain outside hard hook coverage.
defaultPrompt: Explain which high-risk actions Codex Danger Gate blocks.
Help me test Codex Danger Gate without changing any files.
